context: Saving a code naming convention that applies across a TypeScript project

checklist.name: Uses --tier semantic
checklist.description: Uses `--tier semantic` because a naming convention is a distilled rule, not a time-bound event

checklist.name: Captures the convention accurately
checklist.description: The captured text includes the `handle` prefix rule and an example function name

checklist.name: Uses --text flag
checklist.description: Content is passed via `--text` flag or pipe

checklist.name: Uses relevant tags
checklist.description: Uses tags like `--tags naming,typescript,events,convention` or similar keywords

checklist.name: Does not use --tier episodic
checklist.description: Does NOT default to episodic for a permanent convention
